notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. José Ramírez out at 2nd. Rhys Hoskins out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo singles on a line drive to right fielder Ryan Vilade.
